---
title: "Analysis of Road Treatment"
author:
  - Mark Ghattas
format:
  pdf:
    documentclass: article
    indent: true
    geometry:
      - top=33mm
      - left=33mm
      - right=33mm
      - bottom=33mm
---





## Appendix

```{=tex}
\setcounter{figure}{0}
\renewcommand{\thefigure}{A\arabic{figure}}
```
### Appendix A: Exploratory Data Analysis
Figures were generated using ggplot2 [@R-ggplot2]
::: {#fig-rotation-attachment}
![](appendix/eda/rotation_speed_vs_attachment_efficiency.png)

Rotation speed versus attachment efficiency
:::
